headline: The U.S. was warned that Iran planned a new attempt on Trump’s life, investors’ wartime jitters subsided, and France has prepped for soccer’s ‘dark arts.’ Read more in today’s What’s News newsletter:

Wealthy AI workers send San Francisco house prices soaring
